title: Claude Fable 5 plays Factorio
summary: Claude Fable 5 autonomously plays Factorio, a factory-building game, demonstrating the model's ability to strategize and execute complex multi-step tasks involving planning and resource management without human intervention.
writeup: The video shows Claude Fable 5 autonomously playing Factorio, a factory-building game, without human intervention. It demonstrates the model handling complex multi-step tasks that require planning and resource management across the game. The point is to illustrate long-horizon planning and agentic execution: the model strategizes and carries out those plans on its own.
